channel.title: Morning Mail
channel.description: Stay updated on the latest news and events happening in the RPI community.

item.title: FY27 and FY28 Holiday Schedules Now Available
item.description: The Fiscal Year 2027 and Fiscal Year 2028 holiday schedules are now available on the Human Resources Website. Employees are encouraged to review the schedules, including holiday observances and Winter Break/Employee Appreciation Days, to assist with personal and departmental planning.
item.author: Community

item.title: Carousel Maintenance Scheduled for Wednesday July 1
item.description: Carousel Signage has planned maintenance for the Rensselaer cloud instance on Wednesday, July 1, 2026 between 9pm and 11pm Eastern time. During this window, there will be a period where the user interface will be inaccessible (slides cannot be uploaded or modified), and players will display cached content. Players will all automatically reconnect and display updated content once maintenance has been completed.
item.author: Community

item.title: Summer Semester Break Dining Hours Of Operations
item.description:
Please note that dining locations on campus will operate on adjusted schedules for the Summer Semester Break starting on June 27th. Regular summer hours of operations will resume on July 6th. For the hours of operations please click the link above. Thank you and have a safe and enjoyable Summer Semester Break and July 4th!

For information about sharing your news or events, or to change your subscription settings, visit morningmail.rpi.edu.
item.author: Community
